app.name: FleetBox
auth.login.title: Log in
auth.too_many_attempts: Too many attempts. Please try again later.
auth.password.too_short: Password must be at least {min} characters long.
auth.register.title: Create account
auth.register.disabled: Self-service registration is disabled. Please ask an administrator.
auth.register.taken: That email or username is already in use.
search.title: Search
search.prompt: Enter a search term to find vehicles and service records.
dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.no_due: Nothing due. You are all set!
vehicle.list.title: My vehicles
vehicle.list.empty: No vehicles yet. Add your first one!
vehicle.delete.confirm: Really delete this vehicle and all its records?
vehicle.field.name: Name
service.field.title: Title
service.field.name: Name
stats.title: Statistics
stats.no_data: Not enough data yet. Add fuel logs and service records first.
stats.consumption_hint: Needs at least two full-tank fill-ups with a mileage reading.
attachment.title: Documents & photos
attachment.field.title: Title
attachment.hint: Images (JPG, PNG, GIF, WebP) and PDF, up to 10 MB.
admin.title: User management
admin.delete.confirm: Really delete this user and all their vehicles?
backup.title: Backup & migration
backup.intro: Export all your data as CSV files for safekeeping, or import them into another FleetBox instance.
backup.export.title: Export (CSV)
backup.export.hint: Each file contains all of your records. Child records reference their vehicle by name.
backup.import.title: Import (CSV)
backup.import.hint: Upload any of the CSV files you exported earlier. Import vehicles together with their records — rows referencing an unknown vehicle are skipped. Existing vehicles (matched by name) are left untouched.
backup.import.done: Import finished: {vehicles} vehicles, {records} service records, {intervals} intervals, {fuel} fuel logs added. {skipped} rows skipped.
account.security.title: Account security
twofa.title: Two-factor authentication (2FA)
twofa.enable.hint: Protect your account with a time-based one-time code from an authenticator app (e.g. Aegis, Google Authenticator, 1Password).
twofa.disable.hint: Enter a current code from your authenticator app to turn 2FA off.
twofa.invalid: Invalid or expired code. Please try again.
twofa.challenge.title: Two-factor authentication
twofa.challenge.hint: Enter the current code from your authenticator app.
twofa.setup.title: Set up two-factor authentication
twofa.setup.step_scan: Scan this QR code with your authenticator app.
twofa.setup.manual: Can't scan? Enter this secret manually:
